productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women  Printed Beige Top
description: Composition Beige round neck top made of 100% cotton, with short Sleeve and graphic print on the front with sequence work Fitting Comfort Wash care Wash, dry and iron inside out Machine wash delicate at 30 degrees with a mild detergent Do not scrub, bleach, wring, tumble dry or dry clean Dry flat in shade Cool iron, but do not iron on print or embroidery If London is where your dreams lie, then this beige top from united colors of benetton is designed for your wardrobe. The Short Sleeve add attitude to your rounded arms, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with jeans or knee-length denim skirts and heeled sandals for unparalleled cool. Model statistics The model wears size M in cardigans Height: 5'8", Chest: 33"
